--- Page: /events.html ---
Make Your Celebrations Special with Event & Group Dining at Ted's
Event and Group Dining
LET US HELP PLAN YOUR
NEXT PARTY OR EVENT.
A successful party goes well beyond
the end of the meal.
A successful party goes well beyond the end of the meal.  Let us help you plan a memorable event at your local Ted’s that brings people together with timeless ingredients and genuine hospitality.  Think of us when planning:
•  Private Luncheons
•  Corporate Events
•  Holiday Parties
•  Celebrations
•  Catering and Group Dining
All of our locations welcome large parties to the main dining room, and several locations have a private room that can be reserved in advance.  Please complete the following information and someone will be reaching out to you soon to plan your special event.
All fields marked with * are required.
*First Name
*Last Name
*Email
